title: Monkeymons [Cobblemon]
description: This addon adds some Pokemon that are missing in cobblemon!
body:
This addon brings 9 new Pokemon's to Cobblemon!

- Pansear and Simisear (can be found in Mesa Biomes)
- Pansage and Simisage (can be found in Jungle Biomes)
- Panpour and Simipour (can be found in Beach Biomes)
- Oranguru and Passimian (can be found in Jungle Biomes)
- The Legendary Munkidori (can be found in Jungle Biomes as a ultra-rare spawn)


All the base forms of the monkeys evolve with a evolution stone of the respective type.
